revised_title: Set reserve to pattern median with tighter Day 10 review discipline
revised_rationale: Set to the median outcome for the panel-cause + 4A + prior pattern ($60–75k first cut). Book a mandatory Day 10 review — not an optional one — because origin typically returns between Day 7 and Day 12 and reserve accuracy compounds fast after that point. A softer Day 30 review absorbs any subrogation-adjacent revisions.
sme_edit_reason: Original step said 'mark review Day 10 and Day 30' — reviewer emphasized Day 10 must be mandatory not marked, because that's when origin typically lands.

revised_step.title: Set reserve to pattern median with mandatory Day 10 review
revised_step.rationale: Median-outcome reserving ($60–75k first cut) aligns to actual outcomes across the corpus. Day 10 review is mandatory — origin reports historically land between Day 7 and Day 12 and reserve drift after that point is expensive. Day 30 review remains scheduled for subrogation-adjacent revisions.
